channel.title: oldcryptoboi
channel.description: AI agents, deterministic runtimes, and the code that runs them. Building KarnEvil9, Manticore, and LAID.

item.title: I Built a Chrome Extension That Detects AI-Generated LinkedIn Posts
item.description: 14 heuristic signals, peer-reviewed research, and an LLM rubric walk into your feed

item.title: Anthropic Just Validated What KarnEvil9 Has Been Building
item.description: Agent Skills are a step toward structured execution. KarnEvil9 is the full staircase.

item.title: When Eddie, My AI Agent, Ran Out of Credits and Invented Its Own Cost-Cutting Strategy
item.description: How KarnEvil9's futility monitor turned an API credit crisis into an autonomous cost-optimization strategy
